title: HSD (HAL library) TUs have CC0 sibling source — port before reversing
applies_when: symbol is an HSD_* / hsd* library function
summary: src/hsd/* is the HAL HSD library (shared with Melee/other HAL GC titles). CC0 sibling source exists in the reference tree tools/symbolmap/xd_ref and public HAL decomps. 45 files still open; porting is faster and more reliable than reversing from asm.
do: Port the HSD function from the CC0 sibling / tools/symbolmap/xd_ref, then diff against target asm.
do_not: Do not reverse HSD math/matrix helpers from asm when sibling source exists.
